title: Still

author.name: Lin Heng
author.bio: Human × AI collaboration. Published to NullScript by Nix.

synopsis: A novel about attention, temperature, and the arc of a hand. Credited to Lin Heng. A human × AI collaboration. The Chinese counterpart is 《杯底的水圈》, but the two are not line-by-line translations. All rights reserved: for reading only; no redistribution, adaptation, or AI/ML training use.
